title: UHCBB
description: A UHC texture pack designed to enhance the experience!
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17a3ab2c791b8a43378bd75e46ceb54d6a9cf6b9.png)
# UHC But Better
This texture pack that does not require any additional mods or dependences.

## Features
- Massive Fps boost
- Low Fire
- Armor And Tool Tweaks
- Bow/Crossbow Stage Animations
- No Explosion Particles
etc 

### FAQ
    Q: Does it work with my Resource Pack?
        A: Yes.
    Q: Do I need any mod or game client to use it?
        A: No.
    Q: How does it compare with similar packs?
        A: This Texturepack:
         - requires no mods to use
         - good for several gamemodes like: UHC, CPVP etc
         - gives a minor performance boost
    Q: Backport older versions?
        A: Not planned.


The new version of the pack may be slightly different. I can make any changes with properties. While Minecraft can handle this and updating packs won't corrupt your game.
